query: overcast gray flat lighting dull cloudy day no shadows depth collapsed
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — overcast gray, foggy collapsed depth, dull cloudy atmosphere, monotone bleakness

response.objective_caption: A black and white landscape photograph of a vast plowed agricultural field extending toward a low horizon. A single leafless tree stands isolated in the middle distance. The sky is filled with dense, dark storm clouds, interrupted by a bright opening near the top center through which rays of sunlight stream downward onto the field. A narrow strip of grass borders the left side of the field in the foreground.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white landscape photograph of a vast plowed agricultural field extending toward a low horizon, with a single leafless tree isolated in the middle distance. Dense, dark storm clouds fill the sky, interrupted by a bright opening near the top center that sends rays of sunlight downward onto the field, while a narrow grassy strip borders the left foreground. The oppressive darkness of the clouds, stark tonal contrasts, and desolate setting combine to evoke a heavy atmosphere of dread and unease.
